svg.text: Claude apps gateway in AWS GovCloud us-gov-west-1 — every arrow is TLS unless flagged
answers DNS with synthetic CGNAT IPs
real DNS lookup + the source IP
spoke · private subnets only · no IGW/NAT required
Okta SSO only, no local login
Interface VPC endpoints — each with a resource policy
bedrock-runtime (2 approved models only) · ecr.api · ecr.dkr · logs
secretsmanager · ecs · aps-workspaces + S3 gateway endpoint
one customer-managed key: RDS, secrets, log groups, activity
archive, AMP, ECR, portal artifacts + audit (rotation enabled)
EXTERNAL SAAS — THE ONLY PUBLIC DEPENDENCY
gateway + portal — OIDC login + token exchange (TGW egress or proxy)

Boundary facts: no public ingress (internal ALB behind ZPA); no public egress from the inference path (Bedrock endpoint, 2-model policy); clients never contact Anthropic (mirrored, verified binaries; updates disabled).
